zh.lifeSummary: Frances White於1618年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼比斯卡塔華。她於大約1636年與William Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯特拉利 班可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1688年2月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克吉特利享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Frances White于1618年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼比斯卡塔華。她于大约1636年与William Hilton在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼斯特拉利 班可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1688年2月27日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克吉特利享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: White
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English white, wit (Old English hwīt ‘white’), hence a nickname for someone with white hair or a pale complexion. In some cases it is perhaps from a Middle English survival of the Old English personal name Hwīta, a short form of names in Hwīt- (from hwīt ‘white’). The name may also be topographic, referring to someone who lived by a bend or curve in a river or road (from Old English wiht ‘bend’), the source of the placename of Great Whyte in Ramsey, Huntingdonshire (compare Wight ). This name is also a variant of Wight . The surname White is also very common among African Americans.

Irish and Scottish: adopted for any of several Irish and Scottish Gaelic names based on bán ‘white, fair’ (see Bain 1, McElwain ) or fionn ‘fair’ (see Finn 1). The English surname has been Gaelicized in Ireland as de Faoite.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘white’, for example German Weiss , French Blanc , Polish Białas (see Bialas ), Slovenian Belec , or any other synonymous Slavic surname beginning with Bel-, Bev-, Biel- or Bil-.

variants.name: Whitty
meanings: topographic name denoting a ‘dweller by the white hedge or the white (forest) enclosure’, from Middle English whit ‘white’ (Old English hwīt) + heie ‘hedge, enclosure’ (Old English (ge)hæg and Old French haie) perhaps in reference to whitethorn (hawthorn) hedging. This English name has been recorded in Ireland (Wexford) since the 13th century. It has been Gaelicized as de Faoite, see also White .
nickname from Middle English whit ‘white’ + eie ‘eye’ (Old English hwīt + ēage). Compare Blackie 2 and Greeney .
variant of   Witty  , with which this surname may have been confused.

variants.name: Whitson
meanings: English and Scottish (Midlothian): from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Whiteson, literally ‘white son’ or perhaps ‘son of someone named White ’. Occasionally, a variant of Whiston .

variants.name: Whitt
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire): variant of   White  .
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Witt  .

variants.name: McQuitty
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Fhaoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelicization of English White . See also McWhite .

variants.name: Whitecotton
meanings: Apparently a compound of   White   +   Cotton  , but the history is obscure.

variants.name: McElwain
meanings: Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Bháin (Irish) or Mac Gille Bháin (Scottish) ‘son of the fair-haired lad’, often translated into English as White or Whyte but otherwise indistinguishable, once Anglicized, from Scottish Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain in 2 below. Compare Kilbane .
Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Bheathain ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Beathan’, a personal name representing a diminutive of beatha ‘life’. Compare McBain .

variants.name: McWhite
meanings: Irish: partly translated Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Faoitigh, a patronymic from a Gaelic form of English White .

variants.name: Wight
meanings: Scottish and English: nickname from Middle English wiht, wight ‘agile, nimble, strong, brave’ (Old Norse víg with the Old Norse neuter suffix -t, for which compare the word scant), or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht. Possibly sometimes a nickname from Middle English wight ‘living creature; small portion or thing’, or from the corresponding Older Scots word wicht.

English: habitational name from the Isle of Wight. The island is recorded as Vectis (its Latin name) c. 150 AD . Its name derives from a British word, perhaps related to Welsh gwaith ‘turn, course’, meaning ‘place of the division’, in reference to the island's position in the Solent.
English and Scottish: variant of   White  .

variants.name: Whites
meanings: English: variant of White with genitive or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Whitman
meanings: English (southern): from the Middle English personal name Whytman (Old English Hwītmann, from hwīt ‘white’ + mann ‘man’). Compare White 1 and also Wightman , with which this surname was probably confused.
History: John Whitman settled in Weymouth, MA, c. 1638. The poet Walt Whitman (1819–92) was descended from Joseph Whitman, who had settled in Stratford, CT, from England around 1660.

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: Frances White was born in 1618, in Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. She married William Hilton about 1636, in Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 February 1688, in Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Frances White est née en 1618, à Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé William Hilton environ 1636, à Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 février 1688, à Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Frances White wurde 1618 in Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat um 1636 in Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America William Hilton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Februar 1688 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Frances White è nata il nel 1618 nel Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Lei sposato William Hilton circa 1636, nel Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 febbraio 1688, nel Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Frances Whiteは1618年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーピスカタクアで生まれた。約1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーストラウバーイ バンクでWilliam Hiltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1688年2月27日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークキッテリーで70歳で死去した。

ko.Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay, British C: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 피스카타퀄
ko.Kittery Point, Province of Maine or Dove: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버
ko.Kittery, York, Province of Maine, Massac: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이
ko.York, York, Province of Maine, Massachus: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크

ko.Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스트롤베리 뱅크
ko.York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크
ko.Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르
ko.lifeSummary: Frances White(은)는 1618년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 피스카타퀄에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 스트롤베리 뱅크에서 William Hilton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1688년 2월 27일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 키터이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Frances White nasceu em 1618, em Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Ela casou-se com William Hilton aproximadamente 1636, em Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1688, em Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Frances White родилась в 1618 г. в местности пискатакуа, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Hilton около 1636 г. в местности стравбири банк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 февраля 1688 г. в местности киттири, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Frances White nació en 1618, en Piscataqua, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Se casó con William Hilton aproximadamente 1636, en Strawbery Banke, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1688, en Kittery, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años.
